name: Apricot Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats, butter, cinnamon, and 1/8 teaspoon nutmeg in a small bowl. Press the mixture onto the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie plate. Bake at 425 degrees for 7 to 10 minutes, until lightly browned.
2. Meanwhile, combine cottage cheese and cream cheese, eggs, dates, 1/3 cup pineapple juice, vanilla extract, orange zest, and remaining nutmeg in a food processor or blender. Blend until well mixed.
3. Pour the mixture into the cooled crust and bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes, until filling is set. Chill at least one hour.
4. Combine the remaining pineapple juice and cornstarch in a small saucepan. Heat to boiling. Boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly, until thickened and clear.
5. Arrange drained apricot halves on top of the cheese filling and spoon the pineapple glaze evenly over the apricots. Refrigerate until the glaze is set.
